name: USS SC-1070 (SC-1070)
events: 8 Apr 1945 USS Balao (Lt.Cdr. R.K. Worthington, USN) ended her 8th war patrol at Guam. She was escorted in by USS SC-1070.
At Guam she was refitted by Submarine Division 201 Relief crew and the USS Proteus. Refit was completed on 23 April 1945. Training was carried out during 25 April to 1 May 1945.
12 Apr 1945 USS Atule (Cdr. J.H. Maurer, USN) departed Guam for her patrol area. She was escorted out by USS SC-1070.
